criteria.description: Reusable native compatibility harness runs the acceptance ping against a NativeRuntime and returns a structured verdict.
criteria.notes: NativeRuntimeCompatibility checks a PhpExtensionBridge fixture and returns a NativeRuntimeCompatibilityReport.

criteria.description: Acceptance contract preserves operation, ok status, native-compatible answer, and runtime metrics.
criteria.notes: Tests assert the acceptance operation, payload answer, report shape, and metrics.

criteria.description: Unavailable and incompatible runtimes normalize to reports instead of uncaught CLI failures.
criteria.notes: Malformed bridge responses produce incompatible reports; missing extensions produce unavailable reports.

criteria.description: CLI exposes fixture and extension compatibility checks without interactive input or external services.
criteria.notes: bin/purple native check fixture exits 0; missing extension check exits 1 with unavailable JSON.

criteria.description: Runtime and CLI tests cover fixture success, incompatible payloads, unavailable extensions, and usage errors.
criteria.notes: Focused runtime and CLI suites passed in the WP lanes.

criteria.description: Native runtime docs explain compatibility command, output shape, fixture mode, extension mode, and guardrails.
criteria.notes: Docs include command examples and explain Composer-safe fixture checks versus opt-in extension checks.

criteria.description: Roadmap and architecture docs mark native compatibility prototype complete and separate it from package and sidecar tracks.
criteria.notes: Phase 5.5 is recorded as complete; follow-ups remain Bedrock release, provider split, sidecar transport, and compiled native spike.

criteria.description: Composer-mode root and provider-package validation remain free of native extension requirements.
criteria.evidence: composer check; composer check --working-dir=packages/provider-bedrock; bin/purple native check fixture; bin/purple native check extension definitely_missing_purple_native_extension
criteria.notes: Validation commands run with no native extension installed; extension check reports unavailable instead of becoming a dependency.

negative_invariants.description: No compiled extension, FFI binding, daemon, network service, cloud SDK, AWS credentials, or live service is required by root validation.
negative_invariants.evidence: Command exited 0 in lane-c: PHPUnit 130 tests, PHPStan no errors, php-cs-fixer dry-run no changed files; no native extension was installed.
